Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judment
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MICHAEL GROHALL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.
Appearances: Howard Olsen of the Law Office of Michael Heath (931.4207) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge Harold Kahn; Not reported
